name: Sweet Sour Veggies
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. can pineapple chunks in their own juice (reserve)
1 bunch scallions, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 large green pepper, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve its juice.
2. In a large pot or wok, sauté onion wedges until softened (about 5 minutes).
3. Add scallions, garlic, ginger, and green pepper; cook for an additional minute.
4. Stir in carrots and broccoli, then simmer over low heat for 5 minutes.
5. Combine sauce ingredients in a separate bowl: mix soy sauce, brown sugar, cornstarch, vinegar, and reserved pineapple juice.
6. Stir the sauce mixture into the pot with vegetables, ensuring even coating.
7. Cook until thickened, about 2-3 minutes. Adjust acidity by adding more or less vinegar if desired.
